prompt: Modify image 1, an isometric floor plan diagram, by applying the soft, stylized 3D appearance and gentle color palette from image 3 to its internal layout, machinery, and figures. Also, place the logo from image 2 in the bottom left corner of the diagram.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, an isometric floor plan diagram, by applying the soft, stylized 3D aesthetic, rounded forms, and gentle pastel color palette (similar to the pink and cream tones) from image 3 to its internal layout, machinery, and figures. Additionally, incorporate the isometric 'AMAA' graphic, which forms the office layout in image 2, into the bottom left corner of the diagram.
objects: Internal walls and partitions of the floor plan, with a soft, stylized 3D aesthetic, rounded forms, and pastel colors
Machinery within the floor plan, with a soft, stylized 3D aesthetic, rounded forms, and pastel colors
Figures within the floor plan, with a soft, stylized 3D aesthetic, rounded forms, and pastel colors
Isometric 'AMAA' graphic from image 2, in the bottom left corner
Office layout elements (desks, chairs, figures) integrated into the 'AMAA' graphic
